AnimaArtistTagSelector.description: Select multiple artist style tags visually through an advanced preview grid panel.

artist_tags.name: Artist Tags
artist_tags.tooltip: The selected artist tags list, formatted as @artist_name.

mode.name: Concatenation Mode
mode.tooltip: Append selected tags to optional input prompt, or override it completely.

opt_prompt.name: Optional Prompt
opt_prompt.tooltip: An optional input prompt text slot to merge with selected tags.

AnimaArtistTagSelectorPlus.description: Enhanced Artist Tag Selector, automatically concatenating artist tags and extra custom text via a custom separator.

artist_tags.name: Artist Tags
artist_tags.tooltip: The selected artist tags list, formatted as @artist_name.

extra_text.name: Custom Text
extra_text.tooltip: A custom prompt text input below the artist tags.

separator.name: Separator
separator.tooltip: The delimiter used to join both sections, defaults to ', '.

AnimaCharacterTagSelector.description: Select multiple anime character tags visually through an advanced preview grid panel.

character_tags.name: Character Tags
character_tags.tooltip: The selected character tags list, separated by commas.

mode.name: Concatenation Mode
mode.tooltip: Append selected tags to optional input prompt, or override it completely.

opt_prompt.name: Optional Prompt
opt_prompt.tooltip: An optional input prompt text slot to merge with selected tags.

AnimaCharacterTagSelectorPlus.description: Enhanced Character Tag Selector, automatically concatenating character tags and extra custom text via a custom separator.

character_tags.name: Character Tags
character_tags.tooltip: The selected character tags list, separated by commas.

extra_text.name: Custom Text
extra_text.tooltip: A custom prompt text input below the character tags.

separator.name: Separator
separator.tooltip: The delimiter used to join both sections, defaults to ', '.

AnimaClothingTagSelector.description: Select multiple clothing prompt tags visually through an advanced 2:3 preview grid panel.

clothing_tags.name: Clothing Tags
clothing_tags.tooltip: The selected clothing prompt tags list, separated by commas.

mode.name: Concatenation Mode
mode.tooltip: Append selected tags to optional input prompt, or override it completely.

opt_prompt.name: Optional Prompt
opt_prompt.tooltip: An optional input prompt text slot to merge with selected clothing tags.

AnimaClothingTagSelectorPlus.description: Enhanced Clothing Tag Selector, automatically concatenating clothing tags and extra custom text via a custom separator.

clothing_tags.name: Clothing Tags
clothing_tags.tooltip: The selected clothing prompt tags list, separated by commas.

extra_text.name: Custom Text
extra_text.tooltip: A custom prompt text input below the clothing tags.

separator.name: Separator
separator.tooltip: The delimiter used to join both sections, defaults to ', '.

AnimaBackgroundTagSelector.description: Select multiple background prompt tags visually through an advanced 2:3 preview grid panel.

background_tags.name: Background Tags
background_tags.tooltip: The selected background prompt tags list, separated by commas.

mode.name: Concatenation Mode
mode.tooltip: Append selected tags to optional input prompt, or override it completely.

opt_prompt.name: Optional Prompt
opt_prompt.tooltip: An optional input prompt text slot to merge with selected background tags.

AnimaBackgroundTagSelectorPlus.description: Enhanced Background Tag Selector, automatically concatenating background tags and extra custom text via a custom separator.

background_tags.name: Background Tags
background_tags.tooltip: The selected background prompt tags list, separated by commas.

extra_text.name: Custom Text
extra_text.tooltip: A custom prompt text input below the background tags.

separator.name: Separator
separator.tooltip: The delimiter used to join both sections, defaults to ', '.

AnimaPromptComposer.description: Randomly compose artist, character, and clothing prompt tags from the full built-in data range at workflow runtime.

enable_artist.name: Enable Artist
enable_artist.tooltip: When disabled, artist candidates are ignored and not included in the output.

enable_character.name: Enable Character
enable_character.tooltip: When disabled, character candidates are ignored and not included in the output.

enable_clothing.name: Enable Clothing
enable_clothing.tooltip: When disabled, clothing candidates are ignored and not included in the output.

character_detail.name: Character Detail
character_detail.tooltip: Choose whether character output uses only trigger words or trigger words plus full feature tags.

seed.name: Seed
seed.tooltip: Use -1 for a fresh random result each run, or a fixed number for reproducible random selection.

artist_count.name: Artist Count
artist_count.tooltip: Number of random artists to use. Character and clothing always select one each when enabled.

preview_collapsed.name: Preview Collapsed
preview_collapsed.tooltip: Internal saved state for the collapsible preview.

AnimaMultiLoraLoader.description: Select, download, preview, and apply multiple Anima LoRA models with cached local thumbnails.

model.name: Model
model.tooltip: The base model to apply selected LoRAs to.

lora_list_json.name: LoRA List
lora_list_json.tooltip: JSON data maintained by the visual LoRA selector, including filenames and model strengths.
